description: A tall, narrow cabinet with a warm wood top and a light gray body. It features two upper doors with woven cane inserts and two wooden knobs, suggesting a display or storage area. Below these doors are four drawers, each with a simple wooden handle, indicating functional storage space. The cabinet stands on four tapered wooden legs, giving it a slightly elevated and airy appearance. The overall design is clean and modern with a touch of natural texture from the cane and wood.
